name: Medicaid 2026 Rule Trace Pathway Coverage Households

columns.name: person.__targetPathwayLabel
columns.value: m={"ADULT_133" => "Adult Group- Individuals at or below 133 FPL", "CHILD_PUB_EMP" => "CHILDREN_WITH_ACCESS_TO_PUBLIC_EMPLOYEE_COVERAGE", "TITLEIVE_CHILD" => "Children with Title IV-E Foster Care, Adoption, or Guardianship Assistance", "DEEMED_NEWBORN" => "Deemed Newborns", "CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY" => "Dental Only Supplemental (CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY)", "DAC" => "Disabled Adult Children (DAC)", "DWW_EARLY_SS" => "Disabled Widows and Widowers, Lost SSI Due to Early Social Security Receipt", "CASH_ASSIST_INST_EXC" => "Eligible for Cash Assistance except Institutionalization (INDIV_ELIGIBLE_CASH_ASSIST_EXCEPT_INSTITUTIONALIZATION)", "EXT_EARNINGS" => "Extended Medicaid due to Earnings", "EXT_SUPPORT" => "Extended Medicaid due to Spousal Support Collections", "FAMILY_OPP" => "Family Opportunity Act", "FAMILY_PLANNING" => "Family Planning", "FOSTER_GUARD" => "Foster Care or Guardianship Care", "FORMER_FOSTER_26" => "Former Foster Care Children (up to Age 26)", "HCBS" => "HCBS", "HOSPICE" => "Hospice", "ABOVE133_U65" => "Individuals above 133 FPL under Age 65", "SSI" => "Individuals Receiving SSI", "ESSENTIAL_SPOUSE" => "Individuals Who Are Essential Spouses", "CHILD_U19" => "Infants and Children under Age 19 (Mandatory)", "KIDS_WAIVER" => "Kids\u2019 Waivers", "MEDICALLY_NEEDY" => "Medically Needy", "MENTAL_HEALTH" => "Mental Health Expansion", "NONIVE_ADOPT" => "Non-IV-E Adoption Assistance", "OPT_TLI_CHILD" => "Optional Targeted Low-Income Children", "PACE" => "PACE", "PARENT_CARETAKER" => "Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives", "POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED" => "Poverty Level Aged or Disabled", "PREGNANT" => "Pregnant Women", "POSTPARTUM" => "Postpartum Women", "QUAL_DISABLED_CHILD" => "Qualified Disabled Children", "QMB" => "Qualified Medicare Beneficiaries", "QI" => "Qualifying Individuals", "SLMB" => "Specified Low-Income Medicare Beneficiaries", "TMA" => "Transitional Medical Assistance (TMA)", "BCC_TREAT" => "Treatment for Breast or Cervical Cancer", "WORK_INCENTIVE" => "Work Incentive", "WORKING_DISABLED_1619B" => "Working Disabled \u2013 Section 1619(b)"}; m[field('__targetPathwayCode')]||field('__targetPathwayCode')

columns.name: person.__testOutcomeIntent
columns.value: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); i=field('__scenarioIndex').to_i%11; ip=["ADULT_133", "ABOVE133_U65", "FAMILY_PLANNING", "PARENT_CARETAKER", "PREGNANT", "POSTPARTUM", "OPT_TLI_CHILD", "CHILD_U19", "CHILD_PUB_EMP", "QMB", "QI", "SLMB", "POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED", "WORK_INCENTIVE", "WORKING_DISABLED_1619B", "FAMILY_OPP", "QUAL_DISABLED_CHILD", "MEDICALLY_NEEDY", "HCBS", "PACE", "CASH_ASSIST_INST_EXC", "MENTAL_HEALTH"]; rp=["HCBS", "PACE", "QMB", "QI", "SLMB", "POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED", "MEDICALLY_NEEDY", "WORK_INCENTIVE", "WORKING_DISABLED_1619B", "SSI", "CASH_ASSIST_INST_EXC"]; if i<=4 then (i==0 ? 'PASS_ALT' : 'PASS') elsif i==5 then 'FAIL_AGE' elsif i==6 then (ip.include?(p) ? 'FAIL_INCOME' : 'FAIL_STATUS') elsif i==7 then (rp.include?(p) ? 'FAIL_RESOURCE' : 'FAIL_STATUS') elsif i==8 then (p=='POSTPARTUM' ? 'FAIL_POSTPARTUM' : (["PREGNANT", "POSTPARTUM"].include?(p) ? 'FAIL_PREGNANCY' : 'FAIL_RESIDENCY')) elsif i==9 then (["QMB", "QI", "SLMB"].include?(p) ? 'FAIL_MEDICARE' : (['TMA','WORK_INCENTIVE','WORKING_DISABLED_1619B'].include?(p) ? 'FAIL_WORK' : 'FAIL_STATUS')) else (p=='CHILD_PUB_EMP' ? 'FAIL_INSURANCE' : (p=='PARENT_CARETAKER' ? 'FAIL_PARENT' : (p=='EXT_SUPPORT' ? 'FAIL_SUPPORT' : (['HCBS','PACE','HOSPICE'].include?(p) ? 'FAIL_INSTITUTION' : 'FAIL_STATUS')))) end

columns.name: person.__ageTarget
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); if p=='DEEMED_NEWBORN' then 0 elsif ["CHILD_PUB_EMP", "TITLEIVE_CHILD", "CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY", "CHILD_U19", "KIDS_WAIVER", "NONIVE_ADOPT", "OPT_TLI_CHILD", "QUAL_DISABLED_CHILD"].include?(p) then (v=='FAIL_AGE' ? random(19,35) : random(0,18)) elsif ["FORMER_FOSTER_26"].include?(p) then (v=='FAIL_AGE' ? random(27,40) : random(18,26)) elsif ["PREGNANT", "POSTPARTUM"].include?(p) then (v=='FAIL_AGE' ? random(50,75) : random(15,44)) elsif ["QMB", "QI", "SLMB"].include?(p) then (v=='FAIL_AGE' ? random(18,63) : random(65,89)) elsif ['SSI','ESSENTIAL_SPOUSE','POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED'].include?(p) then (v=='FAIL_AGE' ? random(5,25) : random(50,89)) else (p=='ADULT_133' && v=='FAIL_AGE' ? random(0,17) : random(19,74)) end

columns.name: person.isParentOrCaretaker
columns.value: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); a=field('age').to_i; v=='FAIL_PARENT' ? false : (['PARENT_CARETAKER','EXT_EARNINGS','EXT_SUPPORT','TMA'].include?(p) ? true : (a>=19 && random(1,100)<=35))

columns.name: person.relationToPolicyholder
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); a=field('age').to_i; if (["CHILD_PUB_EMP", "TITLEIVE_CHILD", "CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY", "CHILD_U19", "KIDS_WAIVER", "NONIVE_ADOPT", "OPT_TLI_CHILD", "QUAL_DISABLED_CHILD"].include?(p)||["FORMER_FOSTER_26"].include?(p)||a<19) then ['Child','Stepchild','Adopted Child','Foster Child','Dependent Child','Grandchild','Ward'].sample else (field('isParentOrCaretaker') && random(1,100)<=25 ? ['Spouse','Domestic Partner','Parent','Sibling','Legal Guardian','Other Dependent'].sample : 'Self') end

columns.name: person.caretakerRelationship
columns.formula: if !field('isParentOrCaretaker') then 'NONE' else r=field('relationToPolicyholder'); a=field('age').to_i; if r=='Spouse' && random(1,100)<=25 then 'STEPPARENT' elsif r=='Grandchild' || (a>=50 && random(1,100)<=20) then 'GRANDPARENT' elsif ['Ward','Legal Guardian'].include?(r) then 'LEGAL_GUARDIAN' elsif r=='Other Dependent' then (random(1,100)<=50 ? 'OTHER_RELATIVE_CARETAKER' : 'NON_RELATIVE_CARETAKER') else 'PARENT' end end

columns.name: person.filingStatus
values: Tax filers not claimed as a tax dependent
Non-filers not claimed as a tax dependent
columns.formula: r=field('relationToPolicyholder'); a=field('age').to_i; if ['Child','Stepchild','Adopted Child','Foster Child','Dependent Child','Grandchild','Ward'].include?(r) || a<19 then 'Tax dependents' elsif a<25 && random(1,100)<=25 then 'Non-filers not claimed as a tax dependent' elsif random(1,100)<=12 then 'Non-filers not claimed as a tax dependent' else 'Tax filers not claimed as a tax dependent' end

columns.name: person.maritalStatus
columns.formula: a=field('age').to_i; if a<18 then 'Never married' elsif a<25 then (random(1,100)<=12 ? 'Married' : 'Never married') elsif a>=65 then (r=random(1,100); r<=18 ? 'Widowed' : (r<=42 ? 'Married' : (r<=49 ? 'Divorced' : (r<=54 ? 'Separated' : 'Never married')))) else (r=random(1,100); r<=32 ? 'Married' : (r<=42 ? 'Divorced' : (r<=46 ? 'Separated' : 'Never married'))) end

columns.name: person.citizenshipStatus
values: Alien with Qualified Status (Five-Year Bar Applies)
Alien with Qualified Status (Five-Year Bar Exempt)
Alien with Qualified Status (No Five-Year Bar)
PRUCOL (Permanently Residing Under Color of Law)
columns.formula: v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); if v=='FAIL_STATUS' && ['ADULT_133','ABOVE133_U65','PARENT_CARETAKER','PREGNANT','POSTPARTUM'].include?(p) && random(1,100)<=60 then ['Undocumented (No Coverage Except Emergency)','Non-Qualified Alien (Emergency Services Only)','Non-Immigrant (Temporary Visa Holder)'].sample else this end

columns.name: person.currentResidenceState
columns.formula: s=field('__rootState'); field('intendToRemainStateResident') ? s : (((["Alabama", "Alaska", "Arizona", "Arkansas", "California", "Colorado", "Connecticut", "Delaware", "District of Columbia", "Florida", "Georgia", "Hawaii", "Idaho", "Illinois", "Indiana", "Iowa", "Kansas", "Kentucky", "Louisiana", "Maine", "Maryland", "Massachusetts", "Michigan", "Minnesota", "Mississippi", "Missouri", "Montana", "Nebraska", "Nevada", "New Hampshire", "New Jersey", "New Mexico", "New York", "North Carolina", "North Dakota", "Ohio", "Oklahoma", "Oregon", "Pennsylvania", "Rhode Island", "South Carolina", "South Dakota", "Tennessee", "Texas", "Utah", "Vermont", "Virginia", "Washington", "West Virginia", "Wisconsin", "Wyoming"] - [s]).sample) || 'Texas')

columns.name: person.householdMagiIncomePctFPL
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); x=(field('__rootHhFplPctBase')||100).to_f; x=(p=='ADULT_133' ? random(60,132) : (p=='ABOVE133_U65' ? random(134,260) : (['PREGNANT','POSTPARTUM'].include?(p) ? random(70,225) : (['CHILD_U19','OPT_TLI_CHILD','CHILD_PUB_EMP','CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY','DEEMED_NEWBORN'].include?(p) ? random(30,260) : (['QMB','QI','SLMB'].include?(p) ? (p=='QMB' ? random(40,110) : (p=='SLMB' ? random(80,130) : random(100,140))) : (['SSI','ESSENTIAL_SPOUSE','POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED'].include?(p) ? random(20,140) : x+random(-35,35))))))); x+=random(70,180) if v=='FAIL_INCOME'; (x<0 ? 0 : x).round(1)

columns.name: person.countableMonthlyIncome
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); a=field('age').to_i; v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); hh=field('householdMonthlyIncome').to_f; if a<16 || p=='DEEMED_NEWBORN' then 0 elsif ['CHILD_U19','TITLEIVE_CHILD','FOSTER_GUARD','NONIVE_ADOPT','OPT_TLI_CHILD','CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY','CHILD_PUB_EMP'].include?(p) && a<19 then (random(0,200)/1.0).round(2) elsif ['SSI','WORKING_DISABLED_1619B','WORK_INCENTIVE','QMB','QI','SLMB','POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED'].include?(p) then ((v=='FAIL_INCOME' ? random(1800,6500) : random(0,2500))/1.0).round(2) else z=(hh*(random(18,65)/100.0)); (v=='FAIL_INCOME' ? z+random(300,1500) : z).round(2) end

columns.name: person.countableResources
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); a=field('age').to_i; if a<19 then ((v=='FAIL_RESOURCE') ? random(5000,25000) : random(0,1000)).round(2) elsif ['QMB','QI','SLMB','SSI','POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED','WORK_INCENTIVE','WORKING_DISABLED_1619B','PACE','HCBS','MEDICALLY_NEEDY','CASH_ASSIST_INST_EXC'].include?(p) then ((v=='FAIL_RESOURCE') ? random(4000,25000) : random(0,2000)).round(2) else random(0,20000).round(2) end

columns.name: person.pregnancyStatus
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); a=field('age').to_i; s=field('sex'); if s!='F'||a<10 then 'not pregnant' elsif p=='PREGNANT' then (v=='FAIL_PREGNANCY' ? 'not pregnant' : 'pregnant') elsif p=='POSTPARTUM' then (v=='FAIL_PREGNANCY' ? 'pregnant' : 'postpartum') elsif a>=15&&a<=44 then (r=random(1,100); r<=7 ? 'pregnant' : (r<=11 ? 'postpartum' : 'not pregnant')) else 'not pregnant' end

columns.name: person.disabilityStatus
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); dpaths=['SSI','POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED','DAC','DWW_EARLY_SS','QUAL_DISABLED_CHILD','WORK_INCENTIVE','WORKING_DISABLED_1619B','HCBS','KIDS_WAIVER','FAMILY_OPP']; if dpaths.include?(p) then (v=='FAIL_STATUS' ? 'NOT_DISABLED' : (r=random(1,100); r<=58 ? 'DISABLED_SSA_DETERMINED' : (r<=87 ? 'DISABLED_STATE_DETERMINED' : 'PENDING_DISABILITY_DETERMINATION'))) else (random(1,100)<=2 ? 'PENDING_DISABILITY_DETERMINATION' : 'NOT_DISABLED') end

columns.name: person.medicareEntitledPartA
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); a=field('age').to_i; v=='FAIL_MEDICARE' ? false : (['QMB','QI','SLMB'].include?(p) ? true : (a>=65 ? random(1,100)<=88 : (field('disabilityStatus')!='NOT_DISABLED' && random(1,100)<=22)))

columns.name: person.hasAccessToPublicEmployeeCoverage
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); p=='CHILD_PUB_EMP' ? (field('__testOutcomeIntent')=='FAIL_INSURANCE' ? false : true) : (p=='PREGNANT' && random(1,100)<=18 ? true : random(1,100)<=9)

columns.name: person.institutionalized
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); p=='PACE' ? !['FAIL_INSTITUTION','FAIL_STATUS'].include?(v) : (p=='HCBS' ? (v=='FAIL_INSTITUTION' ? false : random(1,100)<=55) : (p=='HOSPICE' ? (v=='FAIL_INSTITUTION' ? false : random(1,100)<=35) : random(1,100)<=6))

columns.name: person.priorEligibilityPathway
values: Adult Group- Individuals at or below 133% FPL
Certain Individuals Needing Treatment for Breast or Cervical Cancer
Children Eligible for Dental Only Supplemental Coverage
Children with Access to Public Employee Coverage
Disabled Widows and Widowers Ineligible for SSI due to Early Receipt of Social Security
Disabled Widows and Widowers Ineligible for SSI due to Increase in OASDI
Extended Medicaid due to Spousal Support Collections
Family Opportunity Act Children with Disabilities
Individuals Eligible for Cash Assistance except for Institutionalization
Individuals Eligible for Family Planning Services
Individuals Eligible for Home and Community-Based Services
Individuals Eligible for Home and Community-Based Services -- Special Income Level
Individuals participating in a PACE Program under Institutional Rules
Optional State supplement Recipients, 209(b) States, and SSI Criteria States without 1616 Agreements
Individuals Receiving Home and Community Based Services under Institutional Rules
Individuals Who Lost Eligibility for SSI/SSP Due to an Increase in OASDI Benefits in 1972
Individuals Who Would be Eligible for SSI/SSP but for OASDI COLA increases since April 1977
Individuals with mental health Conditions (expansion group)
Institutionalized Individuals Eligible under a Special Income Level
Medically Needy Blind or Disabled Individuals Eligible in 1973
Medically Needy Parents and Other Caretakers
Optional Coverage of Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives
Optional State Supplement Recipients, 1634 States, and SSI Criteria States with 1616 Agreements
Optional State Supplement Recipients, 209(b) States, and SSI Criteria States without 1616 Agreements
Pregnant Women with Access to Public Employee Coverage
Reasonable Classifications of Individuals under Age 21
Ticket to Work Medical Improvements Group
Medicaid Buy-In for Workers with Disabilities
columns.formula: p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); if p=='TMA' then 'Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives' elsif p=='EXT_EARNINGS' then 'Adult Group- Individuals at or below 133% FPL' elsif p=='POSTPARTUM' then 'Pregnant Women' elsif p=='WORKING_DISABLED_1619B' then 'Individuals Receiving SSI' elsif random(1,100)<=88 then nil else this end

columns.name: person.__expectedPopulationCode
columns.formula: m={"ADULT_133" => "EXPANSION_ADULT", "ABOVE133_U65" => "EXPANSION_ADULT", "PARENT_CARETAKER" => "PARENT_CARETAKER", "EXT_EARNINGS" => "PARENT_CARETAKER", "EXT_SUPPORT" => "PARENT_CARETAKER", "TMA" => "PARENT_CARETAKER", "PREGNANT" => "PREGNANT_PERSON", "POSTPARTUM" => "POSTPARTUM", "DEEMED_NEWBORN" => "INFANT", "CHILD_U19" => "CHILD", "OPT_TLI_CHILD" => "CHILD", "CHILD_PUB_EMP" => "CHILD", "CHILD_DENTAL_ONLY" => "CHILD", "TITLEIVE_CHILD" => "FOSTER_CARE_CHILD", "FOSTER_GUARD" => "FOSTER_CARE_CHILD", "NONIVE_ADOPT" => "FOSTER_CARE_CHILD", "FORMER_FOSTER_26" => "FOSTER_YOUTH", "QUAL_DISABLED_CHILD" => "CHILD_WITH_DISABILITY", "KIDS_WAIVER" => "CHILD_WITH_DISABILITY", "BCC_TREAT" => "BREAST_CERVICAL_CANCER", "HOSPICE" => "HOSPICE", "PACE" => "INSTITUTIONALIZED", "HCBS" => "LTSS_NEEDS", "QMB" => "MEDICARE_BENEFICIARY", "QI" => "MEDICARE_BENEFICIARY", "SLMB" => "MEDICARE_BENEFICIARY", "SSI" => "AGED_OR_DISABLED", "ESSENTIAL_SPOUSE" => "AGED_OR_DISABLED", "POVERTY_AGED_DISABLED" => "AGED_OR_DISABLED"}; p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); t=m[p]||'EXPANSION_ADULT'; field('activeTbRequiringTreatment') && random(1,100)<=20 ? 'TB_PATIENT' : t

columns.name: person.__expectedReasonCodeHint
columns.value: m={"FAIL_INCOME" => "INELIG_INCOME_OVER_LIMIT", "FAIL_AGE" => "INELIG_AGE_OUT_OF_RANGE", "FAIL_RESIDENCY" => "INELIG_NOT_STATE_RESIDENT", "FAIL_INSURANCE" => "INELIG_PRESENTLYUNINSURED", "FAIL_MEDICARE" => "INELIG_NOT_MEDICARE_ENTITLED_PART_A", "FAIL_WORK" => "INELIG_WORK_PARTICIPATION_NOT_MET", "FAIL_PARENT" => "INELIG_NOT_PARENT_OR_CARETAKER", "FAIL_POSTPARTUM" => "INELIG_POSTPARTUM_PERIOD_EXPIRED", "FAIL_PREGNANCY" => "INELIG_PREGNANCY_STATUS_MISMATCH", "FAIL_INSTITUTION" => "INELIG_INSTITUTIONAL_STATUS_MISMATCH", "FAIL_RESOURCE" => "INELIG_RESOURCES_OVER_LIMIT", "FAIL_SUPPORT" => "INELIG_TMA_CRITERIA_NOT_MET"}; v=field('__testOutcomeIntent'); p=field('__targetPathwayCode'); v.start_with?('PASS') ? '' : (v=='FAIL_STATUS' && p=='HOSPICE' ? 'INELIG_NOT_IN_HOSPICE' : (v=='FAIL_STATUS' && p=='BCC_TREAT' ? 'INELIG_NOT_ACTIVE_BREAST_OR_CERVICAL_CANCER' : (m[v]||'INELIG_REQUIREMENT_NOT_MET')))
